auth.constructionDescription: Your specialized destination for the latest waterproofing solutions, wall materials, and construction supplies with international quality standards.
auth.signupConstructionDescription: Join us for exclusive project offers, engineering technical consultations, and direct supply of original construction materials.

branding.description: A unique supply experience combining global quality with local expertise, providing the finest insulation and construction materials with site delivery service.
